name: @callies-universe/brain
description: The comedy engine. Researches the specific car (live), writes a character-shaped stand-up set, and grades it against the anti-cringe rubric so nothing corny ships. Fulfils the generateRoast contract; falls back to a deterministic offline brain when no API key is present.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/offline-check.mjs && node scripts/pipeline-check.mjs && node scripts/cache-check.mjs && node scripts/subjects-check.mjs
